# Design System Reference — Ms. Myên English

> Single source of truth for the visual redesign. This file maps the design system
> into Hallmark's format. The tokens are **already machine-readable** (CSS custom
> properties + JSON), so we **reference the original files directly** instead of
> copying token values into this repo. No new token definitions are invented here.

## 1. What the design system folder actually is

**Format: a mixed Hallmark brand export** (generated by usehallmark.com), containing:

- **Machine-readable design tokens** (the authoritative layer):
  - `colors_and_type.css` — semantic tokens + `@font-face` + component primitives (BIND FIRST)
  - `system/variables.css` — full token set incl. light + `.dark` theme
  - `system/theme.json` — Ant-style token map (`colorPrimary`, `borderRadius`, etc.)
- **Written style guide:** `DESIGN.md` (brand spec), `BRAND.md`, `SKILL.md`, `guide.md`, `README.md`
- **Reference screens (HTML, read-only):** `preview/*.html`, `system/kit.html`, `index.html`, etc.
- **Component library (reference only):** `ui_kits/app/components/*.jsx` (React prototype)
- **Assets:** `fonts/` (Google Sans variable + JetBrains Mono), `logos/` (PNG lockups), `imagery/`, `assets/`

## 2. IMPORTANT — files to EXCLUDE

`source_tokens.css` and `source_examples/*` describe a **different brand** ("Hum · Bubble
sourdough app": mint/cyan/coral accents, Plus Jakarta Sans, `oklch()` values). They are
**NOT** Ms. Myên English and must not be used as a token source for this redesign.

Authoritative token files for this project (in priority order):
1. `colors_and_type.css` — semantic 7-role system + component primitives
2. `system/variables.css` — exhaustive token set (incl. dark)
3. `system/theme.json` — algorithmic token map
4. `DESIGN.md` / `SKILL.md` — posture rules (never invent beyond these)

## 3. Tokens (reference the original files; values summarized for mapping)

### 7 semantic color roles — `colors_and_type.css` `:root`
| Role | Token | Hex | Usage |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| background | `--bg` / `--paper` | `#faf6ee` | page canvas (warm cream) |
| surface | `--surface` / `--paper-face` | `#f7f5ec` | cards, panels |
| foreground | `--fg` / `--ink` | `#12171b` | text, icon strokes |
| muted | `--muted` | `#6c6960` | secondary labels, captions |
| border | `--border` / `--rule` | `#d4d1c7` | hairlines, card edges |
| accent | `--accent` / `--hot-pink` | `#ff4d72` | primary CTA, wordmark, ring |
| accent-2 | `--accent-secondary` / `--gold` | `#ffc928` | M-badge, sparks only |

Depth aliases: `--ink-2 #242a30`, `--pink-deep #d9365d`, `--pink-soft #fff0f3`,
`--gold-deep #d9a218`, `--paper-2 #eeebdf`, `--bg-elevated #faf6ee`.

### Status colors (semantic, from `system/variables.css`)
`--brand-color-success #52c41a`, `--brand-color-warning #faad14`,
`--brand-color-error #ff4d4f`, `--brand-color-info #ff4d72` — each with `-bg`,
`-border`, `-hover`, `-active` variants. **These carry MEANING and must never be
recolored for decorative purposes.**

### Typography
- Display/Body: **Google Sans** (`'Google Sans', 'GoogleSans VariableFont GRAD opsz wght', system-ui, sans-serif`)
- Labels/eyebrows/mono: **JetBrains Mono**, 11px, `0.10em` tracking, uppercase
- Scale: `--text-xs .75rem` … `--text-display clamp(2.25rem, 4vw+.75rem, 4rem)`
- Line heights: `--lh-tight 1.1`, `--lh-body 1.55`

### Spacing / layout
`--space-2xs .25rem` … `--space-3xl 6.5rem`; `--section-gap 6.5rem`;
`--page-max 78rem`; `--page-gutter clamp(1.25rem, 4vw, 3rem)`.

### Shape / elevation
`--radius-card 20px`, `--radius-pill 999px`, `--radius-input 12px`, `--radius-sm 10px`;
`--border-w 1.5px`; `--shadow-card`, `--shadow-card-hover`, `--shadow-btn`.

### Motion
`--ease-out cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)`, `--ease-spring cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)`;
`--dur-short 220ms`, `--dur-long 420ms`. Honor `prefers-reduced-motion`.

## 4. Component vocabulary (from `colors_and_type.css` + `ui_kits/app`)

| Component | Class | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Button (lead) | `.btn` | pill 999px, pink bg, hard bottom-edge shadow `--pink-deep` |
| Button outline | `.btn--outline` | transparent, pink border |
| Button gold | `.btn--gold` | gold bg, `--gold-deep` shadow |
| Button text | `.btn--text` | minimal, `min-height 40px` |
| Card | `.card` | 20px radius, 1.5px rule, soft dual shadow, hover lift -4px |
| Eyebrow | `.eyebrow` | mono 11px uppercase, pink dot |
| Chip | `.chip` | pill, pink-soft bg, mono label |
| Input/Select/Textarea | `.input` `.select` `.textarea` | 44px min, 12px radius, pink focus ring |
| Mascot ring | `.mascot-ring` | 96px circle, 4px pink ring, white halo |

### Posture rules (must hold)
- Warm cream paper canvas — **never** pure-black/dark chrome by default.
- Lead accent hot pink for CTAs + wordmark; gold for badge/sparks only.
- Cards: 20px radius, 1.5px rule, soft dual shadow, hover lift ~4px.
- Buttons: pills with hard bottom-edge offset shadow.
- Labels/eyebrows: JetBrains Mono 11px / 0.10em uppercase.
- Mascot avatar always circular with pink ring.
- Touch targets ≥ 44px; prefer transform/opacity motion.

## 5. How to apply in THIS repo
The app uses Tailwind (see `tailwind.config.ts`). Plan: map the 7 roles + status colors +
radius/spacing/shadow/motion tokens into Tailwind theme + a global CSS layer that
`@import`s / copies `colors_and_type.css` token block, then apply only to **decorative /
chrome** elements (Step 2 inventory drives this). Semantic status colors are mapped 1:1
and never reassigned to decoration.

## 6. PROTECTED — non-status functional markers (same tier as STATUS_COLORS)

These carry FUNCTIONAL MEANING but are NOT semantic status colors. They must
never be recolored for decorative purposes and must not be "unified" to
`bg-muted-background` / `bg-card-white` in later restyle passes.

| Marker | Class | Hex | Where | Rule |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Today (calendar) | `bg-amber-50 border-amber-300` | `amber-50 #fffbeb` / `amber-300 #fcd34d` | Schedule page day cell for current date | Date indicator, not a status. Leave untouched. |

If a future page adds similar date/context highlighting, add it here and keep
it amber-family (distinct from brand gold `--gold #ffc928`) so it reads as a
neutral "you are here" cue, not a brand or status signal.
